jtwc.title: Hurricane 06E (Fausto) Warning #13

WTPN32 PHNC 220400
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/HURRICANE 06E (FAUSTO) WARNING NR 013//
